Operation 'subscribeTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on what trigger types are supported, authentication requirements, what is returned (subscription ID), and how the webhook will be invoked. AI agents need this information to determine if this operation matches their intent and how to use the returned subscription ID for future operations.

data.current_description: Registers a webhook URL to receive notifications for a specific trigger type.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive event notifications for a specific trigger type (e.g., candidate created, contact updated). Requires authentication via bearer token. Returns a subscription ID that can be used to manage the webhook. The webhook will receive POST requests with event data when the trigger condition is met.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what trigger types are supported, authentication requirements, what is returned (subscription ID), and how the webhook will be invoked. AI agents need this information to determine if this operation matches their intent and how to use the returned subscription ID for future operations.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description doesn't specify that the path parameter is a subscription ID or explain where it comes from. Missing clarity on authentication requirements and the effect of removal (no more notifications). AI agents need to understand the relationship between subscribe and unsubscribe operations and what the ID parameter represents.

data.current_description: Removes a previously registered webhook trigger subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a previously registered webhook trigger subscription by subscription ID. Requires authentication via bearer token. The subscription ID should be obtained from the subscribeTrigger operation response. After removal, no further event notifications will be sent to the associated webhook URL.
data.reasoning: Description doesn't specify that the path parameter is a subscription ID or explain where it comes from. Missing clarity on authentication requirements and the effect of removal (no more notifications). AI agents need to understand the relationship between subscribe and unsubscribe operations and what the ID parameter represents.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeEmail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about input format (email field in request body), authentication requirements, what the response contains, and the side effect (no future communications). AI agents need to understand what data to provide, how the operation affects the candidate/contact record, and what confirmation they'll receive.

data.current_description: Unsubscribes a candidate or contact by their email address.
data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes a candidate or contact from communications by their email address. Requires authentication via bearer token. Accepts the email address in the request body. Returns confirmation of the unsubscribe action. After execution, the candidate or contact will no longer receive marketing or recruitment communications from the Firefish platform.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about input format (email field in request body), authentication requirements, what the response contains, and the side effect (no future communications). AI agents need to understand what data to provide, how the operation affects the candidate/contact record, and what confirmation they'll receive.
